lines.taxMan: [smug] River, bad news. Your checker owes rent. Good news: I'm the landlord.
lines.bribe: [whispers] River, press No if you want. I already colored it Yes.
lines.magnets: River, your mouse works fine. I magnetized the checker because I fear your talent.
lines.kingInflation: River, look away. My checker took one step and updated its resume to king.
lines.pocketSand: [shouts] Pocket sand, River! Please blink while my checkers commit cardio.
lines.wind: River, that wasn't cheating. The board has weather now. Extremely targeted weather.
lines.unoReverse: River, surprise! You're controlling my pieces now. Please make me look talented.
lines.pitfall: River, mind the new hole. I put up a warning sign in another dimension.
lines.distraction: River, look at the dancing emoji! Definitely don't count your checkers right now.
lines.outage: River, the screen went dark naturally. Ignore the tiny wrench in my hand.
lines.infiniteJump: River, this checker found the jump button and has absolutely no bedtime.
lines.construction: River, two squares are closed for construction. Completion date: after you lose.
lines.clone: River, I photocopied a checker. The printer said it was emotionally necessary.
lines.donut: River, your checker became a donut. That's called a delicious career change.
lines.teleport: River, my checker bought fast travel. Your side of the board had snacks.
lines.bully: River, my checker said beep beep, and your checker forgot it had boundaries.
lines.tinyHorse: River, we're playing chess for six seconds. Keep up. Tiny horse rules!
lines.shrinkRay: River, I shrank your checker so it fits inside your chances of winning.
lines.timeOut: River, your checker is in timeout for believing in fair rules.
lines.lavaFloor: River, three squares are lava now. My insurance specifically excludes your checkers.
lines.exchange: River, your checker is studying abroad. It did not submit the paperwork.
lines.doubleTrouble: River, it's Double-Move Tuesday. Yes, I printed the calendar myself.
lines.moonGravity: River, your next move has moon gravity. NASA blocked my number again.
lines.replayReview: River, instant replay says your move never happened. The referee is also me.
lines.boardTilt: River, somebody tilted the table. Weird how every piece slid in my favor.
